occupation: Strategy Director at Blue Rhine Industries
headline: Director Strategy @ Blue Rhine Industries | SDG-Aligned Digital Transformation Leader | Keynote Speaker | Advocate for Green Signage, Professional AV & Wayfinding Solutions
summary:
With a distinguished career shaped by my expertise in digital business innovation, I have a proven track record of working with global tech giants. Hailing from the UK, my professional journey steered me to the dynamic landscape of the UAE in 2015.

As the Strategy Director at Blue Rhine, I play an instrumental role in aligning strategic vision with creative expression, ensuring that business goals seamlessly translate into cohesive brand execution. In the realm of phygital convergence, consumer marketing and demand generation are my forte, all thanks to my multicultural background. I help clients with systematic restructuring approaches for customer experience management.

I view digital transformation as the launchpad, not the destination. To propel a company into digital acceleration, it's crucial to seize the latest trends and technologies as strategic tools, not fleeting fads. This philosophy forms the bedrock of my strategic support for clients dedicated to long-term success.

Beyond the boardroom, I serve as a keynote speaker at various regional and global forums. I regularly contribute, shaping well-rounded narratives on sustainable and innovative business practices within the signage and wayfinding industry.

recommendations:
Steve Ashdown

Nita was extremely helpful with my uptake of new knewledge at SuperOffice and is a naturally gifted speaker, both with presentations and also in general discussions. A true pro who will generate success wherever her attention is focused!

Damon Evans

I have worked closely with Nita for over a year now, on several large Gartner events, and it has been a pleasure to do so. As our account manager, the level of service she has provided, and her dedication to helping us, has been exemplary (despite numerous challenges emanating from our side). Gartner are most fortunate to have her as part of their team.
